examples: The paired relationship of Eros and Thanatos is an expression of this holding.
Those of Thanatos archetypal nature tend to be preoccupied with their appearance from a health standpoint.
If the thanatos instinct over rides then we end up in a similar state. Everything is destroyed, nothing is created and we end up inert again.
The Freudians out there will see the mark of Thanatos: there are no mistakes, this is an unconscious death wish!
